title: EMBRACE-III – Image-guided adaptive brachytherapy in cervical cancer
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Locally advanced cervical carcinoma — MRI-guided adaptive brachytherapy combined with chemoradiation

metadata.brief_title: EMBRACE-III – Image-guided adaptive brachytherapy in cervical cancer
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically confirmed cervical carcinoma (squamous cell, adenocarcinoma, or adenosquamous)

	FIGO stage IB2-IVA

	Age ≥ 18 years

	ECOG performance status 0-2

	Eligible for definitive chemoradiation with brachytherapy

	MRI of pelvis available or planned

	Adequate renal function (GFR ≥ 50 ml/min)

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Distant metastases (stage IVB)

	Prior pelvic radiotherapy

	Pregnancy or lactation

	Contra-indication for MRI

	Contra-indication for cisplatin-based chemotherapy

	Other active malignancy within the past 5 years (except non-melanoma skin cancer)
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Locally advanced cervical carcinoma — MRI-guided adaptive brachytherapy combined with chemoradiation

title: PORTEC-4a – Molecular profile-directed adjuvant RT in endometrial cancer
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Early-stage endometrial carcinoma — molecular classification-guided adjuvant radiotherapy

metadata.brief_title: PORTEC-4a – Molecular profile-directed adjuvant RT in endometrial cancer
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically confirmed endometrial carcinoma

	FIGO stage I-II after hysterectomy and bilateral salpingo-oophorectomy

	High-intermediate risk profile

	Age ≥ 18 years

	ECOG performance status 0-2

	Molecular classification available (p53, POLE, MMR)

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Serous or clear cell histology (high-risk group)

	Stage III-IV disease

	Prior pelvic radiotherapy

	Pregnancy

	Other active malignancy requiring systemic treatment
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Early-stage endometrial carcinoma — molecular classification-guided adjuvant radiotherapy

title: VULVAR-II – Chemoradiation with dose escalation for advanced vulvar SCC
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Advanced vulvar/vaginal squamous cell carcinoma — dose-escalated chemoradiation

metadata.brief_title: VULVAR-II – Chemoradiation with dose escalation for advanced vulvar SCC
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically confirmed squamous cell carcinoma of the vulva or vagina

	FIGO stage IIB-IVA

	Age ≥ 18 years

	ECOG performance status 0-2

	No prior radiotherapy to the pelvis

	Adequate haematological function (WBC ≥ 3.0, platelets ≥ 100)

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Distant metastases

	Prior pelvic radiotherapy

	Pregnancy or lactation

	Severe comorbidity precluding chemoradiation

	Inability to undergo PET-CT
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Advanced vulvar/vaginal squamous cell carcinoma — dose-escalated chemoradiation

title: PSMA-SRT – PSMA PET/CT-guided salvage RT for prostate cancer
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Prostate adenocarcinoma post-prostatectomy — PSMA-guided salvage radiotherapy

metadata.brief_title: PSMA-SRT – PSMA PET/CT-guided salvage RT for prostate cancer
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically confirmed prostate adenocarcinoma

	Prior radical prostatectomy

	Biochemical recurrence (PSA ≥ 0.2 ng/mL)

	Age ≥ 18 years

	ECOG performance status 0-1

	PSMA PET/CT scan available or planned

	No distant metastases on PSMA PET/CT

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Distant metastases on conventional imaging

	Prior pelvic radiotherapy

	Gleason score unavailable

	Active other malignancy requiring treatment

	Contra-indication for pelvic RT
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Prostate adenocarcinoma post-prostatectomy — PSMA-guided salvage radiotherapy

title: PRESTO – Proton therapy for seminoma stage I-II
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Testicular seminoma — proton vs photon para-aortic RT

metadata.brief_title: PRESTO – Proton therapy for seminoma stage I-II
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically confirmed testicular seminoma

	Stage I-IIB (TNM)

	Age ≥ 18 years

	Orchiectomy performed

	Adequate renal and hepatic function

	ECOG performance status 0-1

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Non-seminomatous germ cell tumour component

	Stage IIC or higher

	Prior retroperitoneal radiotherapy

	Distant metastases

	Active second malignancy
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Testicular seminoma — proton vs photon para-aortic RT

title: PIRO – Penile cancer organ-sparing RT
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Penile SCC — organ-sparing radiotherapy for early and locally advanced disease

metadata.brief_title: PIRO – Penile cancer organ-sparing RT
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically confirmed squamous cell carcinoma of the penis

	Stage cT1-T3, any N, M0

	Age ≥ 18 years

	ECOG performance status 0-2

	Patient preference for organ-sparing approach

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Distant metastases

	Prior penile radiotherapy

	Invasion into urethra requiring diversion

	Active second malignancy requiring systemic therapy
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Penile SCC — organ-sparing radiotherapy for early and locally advanced disease

title: RAZOR-2 – SBRT for renal cell carcinoma
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Renal cell carcinoma — stereotactic body RT for inoperable or patient-preference cases

metadata.brief_title: RAZOR-2 – SBRT for renal cell carcinoma
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically or radiologically confirmed renal cell carcinoma

	cT1-T2a, N0, M0

	Age ≥ 18 years

	Not eligible for or declining surgery

	ECOG performance status 0-2

	Adequate renal function (eGFR ≥ 30 ml/min)

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Bilateral renal tumours requiring treatment

	Distant metastases

	Prior RT to the ipsilateral kidney

	Pregnancy
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Renal cell carcinoma — stereotactic body RT for inoperable or patient-preference cases

title: CONCORDE – Concurrent chemoradiation + immunotherapy in stage III NSCLC
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Stage III NSCLC — concurrent chemoradiation with durvalumab consolidation

metadata.brief_title: CONCORDE – Concurrent chemoradiation + immunotherapy in stage III NSCLC
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically or cytologically confirmed NSCLC (squamous or adenocarcinoma)

	Stage IIIA-IIIC (TNM 8th edition)

	Age ≥ 18 years

	ECOG performance status 0-1

	Adequate pulmonary function (FEV1 ≥ 1.0L or ≥ 40% predicted)

	Adequate haematological function

	PD-L1 status available

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Stage IV (distant metastases)

	Prior thoracic radiotherapy

	Active autoimmune disease requiring systemic immunosuppression

	Prior anti-PD-(L)1 therapy

	Pregnancy or lactation

	Active interstitial lung disease
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Stage III NSCLC — concurrent chemoradiation with durvalumab consolidation

title: SCLC-HYPERION – Hyperfractionated RT in limited-stage SCLC
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Limited-stage SCLC — twice-daily hyperfractionated thoracic RT with concurrent chemotherapy

metadata.brief_title: SCLC-HYPERION – Hyperfractionated RT in limited-stage SCLC
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically or cytologically confirmed small cell lung carcinoma

	Limited-stage disease (confined to ipsilateral hemithorax and regional lymph nodes)

	Age ≥ 18 years

	ECOG performance status 0-2

	Adequate organ function for cisplatin/etoposide

	No prior thoracic radiotherapy

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Extensive-stage disease (distant metastases or malignant pleural effusion)

	Prior thoracic RT

	Contra-indication for cisplatin-based chemotherapy

	Pregnancy

	Severe COPD (FEV1 < 30% predicted)
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Limited-stage SCLC — twice-daily hyperfractionated thoracic RT with concurrent chemotherapy

title: MERKEL-RT – Adjuvant RT vs observation in Merkel cell carcinoma
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Merkel cell carcinoma — adjuvant radiotherapy after wide excision

metadata.brief_title: MERKEL-RT – Adjuvant RT vs observation in Merkel cell carcinoma
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically confirmed Merkel cell carcinoma

	Complete surgical excision with adequate margins

	Stage I-III (AJCC 8th edition)

	Age ≥ 18 years

	ECOG performance status 0-2

	No distant metastases on PET-CT or CT

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Stage IV (distant metastases)

	Immunosuppressed patients (organ transplant, HIV with CD4 < 200)

	Prior RT to the same anatomical site

	Pregnancy

	Active second malignancy requiring systemic therapy
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Merkel cell carcinoma — adjuvant radiotherapy after wide excision

title: CSCC-IMMUNO – Cemiplimab + RT for locally advanced cutaneous SCC
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Locally advanced cutaneous SCC — immunotherapy combined with radiotherapy

metadata.brief_title: CSCC-IMMUNO – Cemiplimab + RT for locally advanced cutaneous SCC
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically confirmed cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma

	Locally advanced (cT2-T4) or recurrent disease not amenable to curative surgery

	Age ≥ 18 years

	ECOG performance status 0-2

	Adequate organ function for immunotherapy

	No prior anti-PD-(L)1 therapy

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Distant metastases

	Active autoimmune disease requiring systemic immunosuppression

	Organ transplant recipients

	Pregnancy or lactation

	Prior RT to the same region within 6 months
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Locally advanced cutaneous SCC — immunotherapy combined with radiotherapy

title: BCC-HYPOFRAC – Hypofractionated RT for locally advanced basal cell carcinoma
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Locally advanced BCC — hypofractionated radiotherapy for inoperable or patient-declined surgery

metadata.brief_title: BCC-HYPOFRAC – Hypofractionated RT for locally advanced basal cell carcinoma
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically confirmed basal cell carcinoma

	Locally advanced disease (cT3-T4) or not amenable to surgery

	Age ≥ 18 years

	ECOG performance status 0-2

	No distant metastases

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Distant metastases

	Gorlin syndrome (requires specialized management)

	Prior RT to the same site

	Pregnancy
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Locally advanced BCC — hypofractionated radiotherapy for inoperable or patient-declined surgery

title: ARTFORCE-2 – Adaptive dose painting in locally advanced H&N SCC
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Locally advanced head and neck SCC — FDG-PET-guided dose painting

metadata.brief_title: ARTFORCE-2 – Adaptive dose painting in locally advanced H&N SCC
diseases: head and neck squamous cell carcinoma
diseases_list: head and neck squamous cell carcinoma
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically confirmed squamous cell carcinoma of the oropharynx, hypopharynx, or larynx

	Stage cT2-T4, any N, M0 (TNM 8th edition)

	Age ≥ 18 years

	WHO performance status 0-1

	Adequate renal function (GFR ≥ 60 ml/min)

	FDG-PET/CT available

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Distant metastases

	Nasopharyngeal carcinoma

	Prior head and neck radiotherapy

	Salivary gland tumours

	Pregnancy

	Severe comorbidity precluding concurrent chemoradiation
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Locally advanced head and neck SCC — FDG-PET-guided dose painting

title: NPC-PROTON – Proton therapy for nasopharyngeal carcinoma
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Nasopharyngeal carcinoma — proton therapy to reduce late toxicity

metadata.brief_title: NPC-PROTON – Proton therapy for nasopharyngeal carcinoma
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically confirmed nasopharyngeal carcinoma (WHO type I-III)

	Stage cT1-T4, any N, M0

	Age ≥ 18 years

	WHO performance status 0-1

	EBV status available

	MRI of head and neck available

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Distant metastases

	Prior head and neck radiotherapy

	Pregnancy

	Contra-indication for MRI

	Active second malignancy
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Nasopharyngeal carcinoma — proton therapy to reduce late toxicity

title: SARC-HEAD – Adjuvant RT for salivary gland carcinoma
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Salivary gland carcinoma — postoperative radiotherapy

metadata.brief_title: SARC-HEAD – Adjuvant RT for salivary gland carcinoma
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically confirmed salivary gland carcinoma (any subtype)

	Stage cT2-T4, any N, M0

	Age ≥ 18 years

	Prior surgical resection planned or completed

	WHO performance status 0-2

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Distant metastases

	Prior head and neck radiotherapy

	Benign salivary gland tumour (pleomorphic adenoma without malignant transformation)

	Pregnancy
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Salivary gland carcinoma — postoperative radiotherapy

title: RAPIDO-2 – Short-course RT + consolidation chemo in rectal cancer
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Locally advanced rectal adenocarcinoma — short-course RT followed by consolidation chemotherapy

metadata.brief_title: RAPIDO-2 – Short-course RT + consolidation chemo in rectal cancer
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically confirmed rectal adenocarcinoma

	cT2-T4, any N, M0

	MRI of the pelvis performed

	Age ≥ 18 years

	ECOG performance status 0-1

	Adequate haematological and hepatic function

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Distant metastases

	Prior pelvic radiotherapy

	Contra-indication for fluoropyrimidine-based chemotherapy

	Pregnancy

	Inflammatory bowel disease in the irradiated area
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Locally advanced rectal adenocarcinoma — short-course RT followed by consolidation chemotherapy

title: PANC-SBRT – Stereotactic body RT for borderline resectable pancreatic cancer
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma — neoadjuvant SBRT for borderline resectable/unresectable tumours

metadata.brief_title: PANC-SBRT – Stereotactic body RT for borderline resectable pancreatic cancer
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically or cytologically confirmed pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma

	Borderline resectable or locally advanced unresectable (per NCCN criteria)

	CA 19-9 available

	Age ≥ 18 years

	ECOG performance status 0-1

	No distant metastases on PET-CT or diagnostic CT

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Distant metastases

	Prior abdominal radiotherapy

	Duodenal invasion precluding safe SBRT

	Pregnancy

	Active second malignancy
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma — neoadjuvant SBRT for borderline resectable/unresectable tumours

title: ESOPHAGO-CROSS2 – Chemoradiation in oesophageal carcinoma
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Oesophageal carcinoma — neoadjuvant chemoradiation (CROSS-2 regimen)

metadata.brief_title: ESOPHAGO-CROSS2 – Chemoradiation in oesophageal carcinoma
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically confirmed oesophageal carcinoma (adenocarcinoma or SCC)

	cT1N1-3M0 or cT2-T4aN0-3M0

	Age ≥ 18 years

	ECOG performance status 0-1

	Operable disease after neoadjuvant treatment

	Adequate cardiac, pulmonary, and renal function

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Distant metastases (cM1)

	Cervical oesophageal carcinoma

	Prior thoracic radiotherapy

	Pregnancy

	Contra-indication for carboplatin/paclitaxel
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Oesophageal carcinoma — neoadjuvant chemoradiation (CROSS-2 regimen)

title: IBCRT – Inflammatory breast cancer — dose-escalated RT
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Inflammatory breast carcinoma — dose-escalated locoregional radiotherapy after neoadjuvant chemotherapy and mastectomy

metadata.brief_title: IBCRT – Inflammatory breast cancer — dose-escalated RT
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically confirmed inflammatory breast carcinoma (cT4d)

	Neoadjuvant chemotherapy completed

	Mastectomy planned or completed

	Age ≥ 18 years

	ECOG performance status 0-2

	HER2, ER, PR status available

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Distant metastases (stage IV)

	Prior chest wall radiotherapy

	Pregnancy or lactation

	Active autoimmune connective tissue disease (scleroderma)

	Inability to lie supine for RT
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Inflammatory breast carcinoma — dose-escalated locoregional radiotherapy after neoadjuvant chemotherapy and mastectomy

title: LOBULAR-RT – Adjuvant RT strategies in invasive lobular carcinoma
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Invasive lobular carcinoma — comparison of boost strategies in adjuvant RT

metadata.brief_title: LOBULAR-RT – Adjuvant RT strategies in invasive lobular carcinoma
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically confirmed invasive lobular carcinoma of the breast

	Stage cT1-T3, N0-N1, M0

	Breast-conserving surgery or mastectomy completed

	Age ≥ 18 years

	ECOG performance status 0-1

	ER/PR status available

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Distant metastases

	Bilateral breast cancer

	Prior breast/chest wall radiotherapy

	Pregnancy

	Invasive ductal carcinoma (pure)
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Invasive lobular carcinoma — comparison of boost strategies in adjuvant RT

title: TNBC-HYPOFRAC – Hypofractionated post-mastectomy RT in triple-negative breast cancer
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Triple-negative breast carcinoma — hypofractionated post-mastectomy or post-BCS radiotherapy

metadata.brief_title: TNBC-HYPOFRAC – Hypofractionated post-mastectomy RT in triple-negative breast cancer
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically confirmed triple-negative breast carcinoma (ER−, PR−, HER2−)

	Stage cT1-T3, N0-N1, M0

	Surgery (mastectomy or BCS) completed

	Age ≥ 18 years

	ECOG performance status 0-1

	Ki-67 proliferation index available

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Distant metastases

	HR-positive or HER2-positive disease

	Prior chest wall RT

	Pregnancy

	Connective tissue disease (scleroderma, SLE)
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Triple-negative breast carcinoma — hypofractionated post-mastectomy or post-BCS radiotherapy

title: NEOSAR – Neoadjuvant RT + hyperthermia for soft tissue sarcoma
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Soft tissue sarcoma — neoadjuvant radiotherapy with regional hyperthermia

metadata.brief_title: NEOSAR – Neoadjuvant RT + hyperthermia for soft tissue sarcoma
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically confirmed soft tissue sarcoma (any subtype including liposarcoma, UPS)

	Localized disease, ≥ 5 cm, deep-seated or high-grade

	Age ≥ 18 years

	ECOG performance status 0-2

	MRI of tumour region available

	Planned surgical resection after neoadjuvant treatment

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Distant metastases

	Retroperitoneal sarcoma (separate protocol)

	Prior RT to the same anatomical region

	Pregnancy

	Contra-indication for hyperthermia (metal implants in treatment area)
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Soft tissue sarcoma — neoadjuvant radiotherapy with regional hyperthermia

title: EWING-PROTON – Proton therapy for Ewing sarcoma
text: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Ewing sarcoma — proton therapy for primary or postoperative treatment

metadata.brief_title: EWING-PROTON – Proton therapy for Ewing sarcoma
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
Histologically confirmed Ewing sarcoma

	Localised disease (no distant metastases)

	Age ≥ 18 years

	ECOG performance status 0-2

	Surgical resection not feasible or incomplete (R1/R2), or patient preference for RT

	Chemotherapy completed or ongoing per protocol

	Written informed consent
metadata.exclusion_criteria:
Distant metastases (except pulmonary metastases treated with whole-lung irradiation)

	Prior RT to the same region

	Pregnancy

	Contra-indication for proton therapy logistics

	Active second malignancy
metadata.brief_summary: Study Type: Interventie, Indication: Ewing sarcoma — proton therapy for primary or postoperative treatment
